text.title: Solo Blameless Postmortem Template Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Solo Blameless Postmortem Template.

example.scenario: Background pool crashed because a worker died and was not restarted. Summary: 'pool stalled 2h'. Root cause: 'no auto-respawn on worker exit'. Prevention rule: 'pool-runner must restart any worker that exits non-zero within 30s'. Appended to memory/mistakes.md.
